# altr_agent (Resource)

Manages an ALTR CLASSIFIER agent.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Copyright (c) ALTR Solutions, Inc.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

resource "altr_agent" "example" {
  type        = "CLASSIFIER"
  name        = "example"
  description = "Example classifier agent"

  public_key_1 = file("${path.module}/agent_public_key.pem")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable name for the agent. Must be unique within the organization.
- `type` (String) Agent type. Must be 'CLASSIFIER'. Cannot be changed after creation.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description of the agent.
- `public_key_1` (String) PEM-encoded RSA public key used by the agent for authentication. At least one public key is required at creation.
- `public_key_2` (String) Optional second PEM-encoded RSA public key for key rotation.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `data_plane_url` (String) URL of the data plane this agent connects to.
- `id` (String) Agent UUID.
- `task_count` (Number) Number of tasks currently assigned to this agent.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
